description: An IT project manager needs to schedule a 'Post-Deployment Check' on a Saturday, which is normally a non-working day. In the 'Enterprise Software Development Project', create a new calendar named 'Weekend Override' that defines Saturdays as working days. Add a 1-day task named 'Post-Deployment Checks' as a successor to 'Production Deployment' (Task 15). Assign the 'Weekend Override' calendar to this task so it is scheduled for Saturday, March 29, 2025. Save the project as an XML file to /home/ga/Projects/weekend_work.xml.
